# Alistigo

> Alistigo is an embeddable list widget. AI systems can create, populate, and update Alistigo lists by producing `AlistigoDocument` JSON-LD objects.

## What is an AlistigoDocument?

An `AlistigoDocument` is a JSON-LD document using `schema.org/ItemList` as its type. It contains two complementary views of a list:

- **`itemListElement`** — the current visible state (projection): an ordered array of `ListItem` objects.
- **`alistigo:listEventLog`** — the append-only event log: the authoritative source of truth from which the projection is derived.

Replaying the event log through the Alistigo projector always reproduces `itemListElement`. An AI system that produces a valid event log and a matching projection is fully interoperable with the Alistigo ecosystem.

## AlistigoDocument JSON Schema

```json
{
  "@context": {
    "@vocab": "https://schema.org/",
    "alistigo": "https://alistigo.ai/vocab/"
  },
  "@type": "ItemList",
  "alistigo:listId": "<TypeID string: lst_...>",
  "alistigo:schemaVersion": "1.0.0",
  "name": "<optional list title>",
  "itemListElement": [
    {
      "@type": "ListItem",
      "alistigo:listElementId": "<TypeID string: lse_...>",
      "position": 1,
      "name": "<element text content>"
    }
  ],
  "alistigo:listEventLog": [
    {
      "alistigo:listEventId": "<TypeID string: lev_...>",
      "alistigo:eventType": "ListCreated",
      "alistigo:listId": "<same TypeID as above>",
      "alistigo:actorId": "<TypeID string: act_...>",
      "alistigo:timestamp": "<ISO 8601 UTC>",
      "name": "<optional title for ListCreated>"
    },
    {
      "alistigo:listEventId": "<TypeID string: lev_...>",
      "alistigo:eventType": "ListElementAdded",
      "alistigo:listId": "<same TypeID as above>",
      "alistigo:listElementId": "<same lse_... as the corresponding itemListElement entry>",
      "alistigo:actorId": "<TypeID string: act_...>",
      "alistigo:timestamp": "<ISO 8601 UTC>",
      "name": "<element text content>"
    }
  ]
}
```

### TypeID format

TypeIDs use the format `<prefix>_<26-char Crockford base32 ULID>`. Examples:
- List ID: `lst_01h2xcejqtf2nbrexx3vqjhp41`
- Element ID: `lse_01h2xcejqtf2nbrexx3vqjhp42`
- Event ID: `lev_01h2xcejqtf2nbrexx3vqjhp43`
- Actor ID: `act_01h2xcejqtf2nbrexx3vqjhp44`

## Event types

| `alistigo:eventType` | Required extra fields | Effect on projection |
|---|---|---|
| `ListCreated` | `name?` (optional title) | Initialises the list |
| `ListElementAdded` | `alistigo:listElementId`, `name` | Appends an element |
| `ListElementDeleted` | `alistigo:listElementId` | Removes an element |
| `ListExported` | — | Audit-only, no change |

## Embedding Alistigo

Alistigo is distributed as an iframe-embeddable SPA. The host page seeds the initial document by writing it into a `<script>` tag before the iframe loads:

```html
<script type="application/json" id="alistigo-document">
{
  "@context": { "@vocab": "https://schema.org/", "alistigo": "https://alistigo.ai/vocab/" },
  "@type": "ItemList",
  "alistigo:listId": "lst_01h2xcejqtf2nbrexx3vqjhp41",
  "alistigo:schemaVersion": "1.0.0",
  "name": "My Shopping List",
  "itemListElement": [
    { "@type": "ListItem", "alistigo:listElementId": "lse_01h2xcejqtf2nbrexx3vqjhp42", "position": 1, "name": "Apples" }
  ],
  "alistigo:listEventLog": [
    {
      "alistigo:listEventId": "lev_01h2xcejqtf2nbrexx3vqjhp43",
      "alistigo:eventType": "ListCreated",
      "alistigo:listId": "lst_01h2xcejqtf2nbrexx3vqjhp41",
      "alistigo:actorId": "act_01h2xcejqtf2nbrexx3vqjhp44",
      "alistigo:timestamp": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z",
      "name": "My Shopping List"
    },
    {
      "alistigo:listEventId": "lev_01h2xcejqtf2nbrexx3vqjhp45",
      "alistigo:eventType": "ListElementAdded",
      "alistigo:listId": "lst_01h2xcejqtf2nbrexx3vqjhp41",
      "alistigo:listElementId": "lse_01h2xcejqtf2nbrexx3vqjhp42",
      "alistigo:actorId": "act_01h2xcejqtf2nbrexx3vqjhp44",
      "alistigo:timestamp": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z",
      "name": "Apples"
    }
  ]
}
</script>
```

The app reads this tag on boot, seeds localStorage, and from then on persists all user changes locally.

## Invariants

1. The `alistigo:listId` in every event record must match the document's `alistigo:listId`.
2. Each `alistigo:listEventId` must be unique within the document.
3. Replaying `alistigo:listEventLog` must produce exactly the same `itemListElement` array.
4. `ListCreated` must be the first event; it must appear exactly once.
5. `position` values in `itemListElement` are 1-based insertion-order integers.

## Public Distribution

### GitHub Pages (regular web — testing and demos)

Iframe-embeddable SPA for use in **regular web pages** (outside Claude):
- English: `https://mlkiiwy.github.io/europa/alistigo/latest/en/`
- French:  `https://mlkiiwy.github.io/europa/alistigo/latest/fr/`
- Pinned: `https://mlkiiwy.github.io/europa/alistigo/{version}/{locale}/`

⚠️ These URLs **cannot** be embedded as `<iframe src="...">` inside Claude artifacts.
Claude's CSP blocks `frame-src` for external `https://` origins.

### npm / jsDelivr (Claude artifact embedding)

The `@alistigo/artifact-manager` package is a self-contained UMD bundle:

```
https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@alistigo/artifact-manager@0/dist/index.umd.js
```

Exposes `window.Alistigo` with `mount(container, options?)`.

## Claude HTML Artifact Template

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
  <meta charset="utf-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1">
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@alistigo/artifact-manager@0/dist/index.umd.js"></script>
</head>
<body>
</body>
</html>
```

Storage: `window.storage` (Claude's persistent key-value API) is automatically used
when the widget detects it is running inside a Claude artifact. No configuration needed.
